summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The job is not a dedupe cluster, so no shared canonical was selected and no close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutation is planned. One explicitly security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling; the remaining hydrated open PRs/issues are kept open for their own review paths.

actions.reason: Useful related maintainer PR in the Windows startup fallback family; keep open and do not close or merge from this plan shard.
Independent small config fix with proof and maintainer-review path; no closure action is supported.
Independent useful bug fix awaiting normal review; no dedupe or closeout path.
Independent PR blocked on proof, not a closure candidate.
Independent broad automation/safety regression PR; keep open for author or maintainer follow-up.
Independent useful fix with re-review path; not low-signal or duplicate.
Independent broad PR with proof/review blockers; keep open for its own review path.
Independent exec config PR with review history; not a duplicate or closure candidate in this inventory shard.
Exact security-sensitive item identified by the preflight artifact; route to central OpenClaw security handling without mutation.
Independent gateway availability fix with proof/check inconsistency; keep open and do not close as duplicate.
Related linked issue in the Windows fallback family; keep open for maintainer follow-up.
Related broader maintainer PR; keep open and avoid selecting it as shared canonical.
